name: Complete company or business entity incorporation
dueRule: Submit the relevant incorporation or business-entity registration through DCIP as a one-time formation event; confirm the current filing route and entity-specific requirements.

name: File company annual return
dueRule: File the prescribed annual return for each applicable reporting year on the date required by DCIP; confirm the current deadline directly with the department.

name: Register as a ZIMRA taxpayer
dueRule: Register through TaRMS within 30 days after starting the business, as stated in ZIMRA's current new-trader guidance.

name: Register for VAT when liable
dueRule: Apply for VAT registration when the business meets the current compulsory registration rules; confirm the current turnover threshold and any voluntary-registration route with ZIMRA.

name: Submit monthly VAT return and payment
dueRule: For an operator assigned a monthly VAT tax period, submit the return and payment by the 25th of the month following the end of that tax period.

name: Submit two-month VAT return and payment
dueRule: For an operator assigned a two-month VAT tax period, submit the return and payment by the 25th of the month following the end of that tax period.

name: Register as an employer for PAYE
dueRule: Apply to ZIMRA for employer registration within 14 days of becoming an employer.

name: Remit monthly PAYE
dueRule: Remit PAYE within 10 days after the end of the month in which the amount was withheld.

name: Submit annual PAYE ITF 16 return
dueRule: Submit the ITF 16 employee earnings, deductions, credits and PAYE return within 30 days after the end of the year.

name: Register employer and employees with NSSA
dueRule: Register the employer and covered employees when becoming an employer of labour; confirm the current scheme-specific registration timing with NSSA.

name: Remit monthly NSSA POBS contributions
dueRule: Remit Pensions and Other Benefits Scheme contributions by the 10th day of the month following the month in which the contribution is due.

name: Renew PRAZ supplier registration
dueRule: Register or renew for each calendar year; an approved category registration remains on the list only up to 31 December and is subject to annual renewal.

name: Renew Harare business licence
dueRule: Renew for each council licensing year under the current Harare process; confirm the applicable cut-off date and licence class with the council.

name: Apply for or update Harare health registration
dueRule: Submit a new, renewal or change-of-ownership application when that trigger applies; confirm the renewal schedule with City Health because the official form does not state one.

name: Renew Bulawayo shop licence
dueRule: Renew the shop licence for the coming calendar year before 31 December or before the current licence expires.

name: Renew Bulawayo premises registration certificate
dueRule: Renew annually; the registration certificate is valid up to 31 December of the current year.

name: Apply for or renew Zimbabwe liquor licence
dueRule: Submit a new application or renewal through the Liquor Licensing Board; use the current licence expiry and Board instructions because no universal renewal date is recorded here.

name: Obtain ESIA certificate before project implementation
dueRule: For a project in an EMA-listed category with potential negative environmental effects, obtain the ESIA certificate before implementing the project.

name: Submit ESIA progress report
dueRule: Submit project progress reports to EMA quarterly while the ESIA certificate conditions require them.

name: Renew ESIA certificate when project commencement is incomplete
dueRule: Where the project has not commenced within the certificate period, apply for renewal six months before the two-year certificate expires.

name: Submit industrial or mining effluent waste report
dueRule: Industrial and mining effluent licence holders must submit waste-management reports to EMA quarterly.
